name: HRG_GOAL_TARGET_OUTCOMES
description: Desired goal outcomes for worker goals, for organization goals and for ad hoc goals are maintained in this table.

columns.Name: GOAL_TARGET_OUTCOME_ID
columns.Comments: The system generated surrogate key for this entry

columns.Name: GOAL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRG_GOALS, which holds the ID of goal.

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_CONTENT_ITEMS_B table which holds the id of the content item

columns.Name: CONTENT_ITEM_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRT_CONTENT_TYPES_B table which holds the id of the content item type

columns.Name: TARGET_RATING_LEVEL_ID
columns.Comments: Expected rating Id of this target outcome entry

columns.Name: TARGET_RATING_LEVEL_ID2
columns.Comments: Additional expected rating for specific target outcomes that have multiple proficiencies.  For example, Language competency has read, write and speak proficiencies that can be individually rated.

columns.Name: TARGET_RATING_LEVEL_ID3
columns.Comments: Additional expected rating for specific target outcomes that have multiple proficiencies. For example, Language competency has read, write and speak proficiencies that can be individually rated.

columns.Name: APPROVED_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: Manager rating Id for this target outcome entry

columns.Name: APPROVED_RATING_ID2
columns.Comments: Additional manager rating for specific target outcomes that have multiple proficiencies. For example, Language competency has read, write and speak proficiencies that can be individually rated.

columns.Name: APPROVED_RATING_ID3
columns.Comments: Additional manager rating for specific target outcomes that have multiple proficiencies. For example, Language competency has read, write and speak proficiencies that can be individually rated.

columns.Name: CONTENT_SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: The source of the content referred in target outcomes

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Comments for this target outcome entry

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
